blob_devnet_updates.highlight: blob-devnet-0: Nethermind and Erigon failing to stay at head on trunk branches
Need stable releases with GetBlobV3 instead of unstable trunk branches

bal_devnet_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-3: Nimbus EL and Etherax nearly done with testing
Besu 19 failures, Geth 49 failures, Nethermind/Reth 400+ failures remaining
Many failures are exception mapping issues, not logic bugs
Minor spec changes deferred to bal-devnet-4 to stabilize current implementation

epbs_specification.highlight: Consensus reached: Store 3 epochs of PTC in state (prev + next 2)
PTC in state enables testability and eliminates caching bugs across clients
State size increase: 256-384KB, negligible compared to hundreds of MB state
Variable PTC deadline postponed; non-consensus, can add later if needed

bal_benchmarking.highlight: Batch I/O flag urgently needed from Nethermind and Erigon for benchmarking
Flag must isolate prefetch optimization, not disable all BAL optimizations
Geth showing 3X speedup from execution parallelization (limited to 4 CPUs)
Nethermind block-building memory leak blocking stateful test generation

account_abstraction.highlight: Frame transaction mempool: Strategy 2 (canonical paymaster) preferred approach
Strategy 1 (self-relaying only) fallback if Strategy 2 faces issues
Full ERC-7562 permissionless paymasters deemed too complex for initial deployment

action_items.action: Update consensus-specs PR #4979 with 3-epoch PTC storage
Add batch I/O prefetch flag (isolate from other optimizations)
Use alternative client (Besu/Geth) for stateful test generation
Schedule breakout Wednesday for Frame mempool discussion

decisions.decision: Store 3 epochs of PTC in consensus state (previous + next 2 epochs)
Variable PTC deadline deferred; can add post-fork if needed
Defer minor 8037 spec changes to bal-devnet-4 to stabilize devnet-3
ePBS devnet-1 focuses on structure testing, not builder API or benchmarking

targets.target: ePBS devnet-1 spec release targeting end of week
